exceptions.title: Malware in @mistralai/mistralai
exceptions.rationale: The installed 2.2.1 predates the May 11 2026 compromise by ~3 weeks. The advisory incorrectly flags all versions >=0. The vulnerable path is only loaded when OpenClaw mode is explicitly enabled. Monitored upstream for corrected version range.
exceptions.remediationPlan: 1) Monitor GHSA-3q49-cfcf-g5fm for corrected version range; 2) Upgrade openclaw to a post-fix release once available; 3) Remove override once upstream resolves.
